title: Am Aabig
desc: Meeting a neighbour in the evening

sn.s: Am Aabig triff ich mini Nachberin im Hus.
sn.e: In the evening I meet my neighbour in the building.

sn.s: Sie wohnt näbed mir, im gliiche Stock.
sn.e: She lives next to me, on the same floor.

sn.s: "Grüezi, Sie sind de Nöi, gäll?" seit sie.
sn.e: "Hello, you're the new one, right?" she says.

sn.s: "Ja, ich bi grad iizoge," antworte ich.
sn.e: "Yes, I just moved in," I answer.
"Thanks, I'm Tom. Nice to meet you."
"Fröit mich" means pleased to meet you.

sn.s: "Wänd Sie spöter uf e Kafi cho?" fragt sie.
sn.e: "Would you like to come for a coffee later?" she asks.

sn.s: Ich bi überrascht vo dere Fründlichkeit.
"Sehr gärn, das wär schöö," säg ich.
sn.e: "Gladly, that would be nice," I say.

sn.s: "Denn chömed Sie verbii. Vilicht am Sächsi?"
"Am Sächsi passt mer guet. Merci viilmal."
sn.e: "Six works well for me. Thank you very much."

sn.s: S'erste Mal iiglade vo eme Nachber.
sn.e: Invited by a neighbour for the first time.

sn.s: Vilicht wird Luzärn würkli mis Dehei.
sn.e: Maybe Lucerne will really become my home.
